name: Popcorn Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic salt, onion salt, celery salt, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce to the melted butter. Mix well.
3. Spread popcorn, pretzels, and mixed nuts in a large shallow baking pan.
4. Pour the seasoned butter mixture evenly over the popcorn, pretzels, and nuts.
5. Toss gently to ensure even coating.
6. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for about 1 hour, stirring every 4-5 minutes to prevent burning.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
8. Store in a tightly covered container.
This recipe makes approximately 2 quarts of popcorn party mix.
